name: emw-warp-mtools_resample
help:
Warp/MTools wrapper to run resample_trajectories. Resamples temporal trajectories of a species. Number of samples is usually between 1 (small particles) and 3 (very large particles).

*REFERENCES*:
[[https://warpem.github.io/reference/mtools/api/mtools/?h=mtools#resample_trajectories][MTools resample_trajectories]]

params.name: resample_trajectories.species
params.label: Species file:
params.help: Required (-s, --species). Path to the .species file or its GUID.

params.name: resample_trajectories.samples
params.label: Number of samples:
params.help: Required (--samples). New number of temporal samples, usually 1 (small particles) to 3 (very large particles). Default: 2.

params.name: extra_resample
params.label: Extra arguments
params.help: Extra arguments to pass to MTools resample_trajectories.

params.name: gpus
params.label: Fixed one GPU
params.help: Hidden parameter to force the use of a single GPU.
